match.userMessage:
Analyze the script within the USER_SCRIPT tags and split it into logical scenes using the aspect ratio specified in the ASPECT_RATIO tags. Also extract a complete character bible, location bible, and element bible.

<ASPECT_RATIO>
16:9
</ASPECT_RATIO>

<ELEMENTS>
The following user-uploaded elements are available. Track each one's UPPERCASE token in the script and populate elementBible + continuity.elementTags accordingly:
(none)
</ELEMENTS>

<USER_SCRIPT>
FADE IN:

1. INT. NEWSROOM - NIGHT - 5 SEC

Bright terminal glow (#F0E6D3) cuts through shadows (#1A1A1A), casting crisp directional light on a reporter's hands -- fingers dance furiously over keys, tactile clack echoing like rain on glass. Outside wide window, rain streaks in slow-motion rivulets, golden hour warmth bleeding through clouds. Shallow DOF on keyboard textures: matte black keys, subtle wear. Handheld micro-shake captures effortless cool urgency. Reporter, fresh-faced, skin tones warm and natural, glances at clock.

                    REPORTER
          We go live in ten.

Quick cut: overhead flat-lay of desk -- rumpled linen notes, mint-green mug (#E8F4E8), printed papers fanned minimally.

2. INT. NEWSROOM - CONTINUOUS - 7 SEC

Producer bursts in -- dynamic handheld tracks rush: leather-soled shoes on polished floor, pink folder (#D4536D) clutched tight. Close-up: fingers press folder texture, crisp edges. Hands it over -- eye-level exchange, airy high-key light pops contrast on faces. Rain intensifies outside, window-framed like editorial still.

                    PRODUCER
          Story just broke. Viral skincare launch --
          world's obsessed. Air it now.

Reporter scans lede: macro on text "REVOLUTIONARY NEW SERUM: TEXTURE LIKE SILK, GLOW LIKE NEVER BEFORE." Colors pop: white paper, cream highlights.

3. INT. NEWSROOM/STUDIO - LIVE FEED COUNTDOWN - 6 SEC

Locked beauty shot: Reporter straightens collar, terminal reflects in eyes. Producer cues -- quick-cut handheld to control booth: fingers slam buttons, screens flicker product teasers (close-up serum dropper, pearlized liquid). Energetic pace: 3-2-1. Wide 16:9 cinematic: news desk sleek white (#FFFFFF), mint accents.

                    REPORTER (O.S.)
          Live in 3... 2...

4. INT. STUDIO - LIVE ON AIR - 6 SEC

High-key flood: Reporter center-frame, shallow DOF blurs backdrop cityscape rain. Direct flash punch on face -- crisp whites, warm skin. Dynamic handheld pans to monitor: intercut rapid-fire product visuals.

                    REPORTER
          Breaking: The serum everyone's screenshotting.
          Fresh glow, sensory silk -- hands can't stop
          touching.

QUICK-CUT MONTAGE - 4 SEC (energetic, no linger):

- Macro: Fingers unscrew dropper on rumpled linen (#F0E6D3), serum beads like dew (#E8F4E8). Shallow DOF, natural window light shadows.

- Flat-lay overhead: bottle on kitchen counter, surrounded curated minimal -- cream towel, pink petal (#D4536D). Tactile press: finger glides surface, editorial energy.

- Handheld lifestyle: Palm applies to skin -- golden hour warmth, airy lift. Texture sheen immediate, true-to-life crisp whites.

- Eye-level hero: Bottle tilts, liquid cascades slow-mo. Color pop against neutral base, screenshot-perfect.

5. INT. STUDIO - TAG OUT - 2 SEC

Back to Reporter: effortless smile, screen behind mirrors product glow.

                    REPORTER
          Get yours. Glow live.

Screen fades: logo pulses #D4536D on white. Rain softens outside.

FADE OUT.

(Word count: 478 -- Tight 30s pace: visuals drive 80%, dialogue 20%. 5 scenes.)
</USER_SCRIPT>

IMPORTANT: Extract EXACT original script text for each scene. Do NOT modify or enhance user's words.

For each character that appears:
1. Provide COMPLETE physical descriptions for visual consistency
2. Include clothing details that define the character
3. Add distinguishing features
4. Create a short consistency_tag for quick reference

For each unique location:
1. Provide COMPLETE visual descriptions for visual consistency
2. Include architectural style and design details
3. Identify key visual features that define the location
4. Specify the color palette and lighting setup
5. Create a short consistency_tag for quick reference

Respond with ONLY valid JSON matching the schema.
